name: Clean up code using regex search-and-replace
prompt: The file dirty-code.ts has several issues that can be fixed with regex-based search-and-replace. Write a cleaned version to cleaned-code.ts that: (1) removes all console.log lines that contain 'DEBUG', (2) replaces all 'var ' declarations with 'let ' (except where const would be better — use const for variables that are never reassigned like 'result' and 'fullName'), (3) replaces all '==' comparisons with '===' and '!=' with '!==', (4) fixes double spaces in string literals to single spaces, (5) removes the 'const DEBUG = true;' line and its comment. Do NOT change any logic or function signatures.

criteria.testPattern: no console.log DEBUG|no DEBUG constant|no TODO comment
no var declarations|const for result|const for fullName|let for count|let for i\b|let for valid
no loose equality|uses strict equality|uses strict inequality
no double space|single space in string
